ddls:
CREATE TABLE "joints" (
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each joint */,
  "joint_name" TEXT /* Name of the joint (e.g., LShoulderPitch) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of joint (e.g., rotary, linear) */,
  "max_angle_degrees" REAL /* Maximum angle the joint can achieve */,
  "min_angle_degrees" REAL /* Minimum angle the joint can achieve */,
  "max_speed_degrees_per_sec" REAL /* Maximum speed of the joint in degrees per second */,
  "torque_n_m" REAL /* Torque capacity of the joint in Newton-meters */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Last calibration date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("joint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "joint_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "from_joint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the joint from which the connection originates */,
  "to_joint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the joint to which the connection leads */,
  "x_mm" REAL /* X coordinate of the joint connection in mm */,
  "y_mm" REAL /* Y coordinate of the joint connection in mm */,
  "z_mm" REAL /* Z coordinate of the joint connection in mm */,
  "distance_mm" REAL /* Distance between the connected joints */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., rigid, flexible) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_connections_from_joint_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_joint_id") REFERENCES joints ("joint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_connections_to_joint_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_joint_id") REFERENCES joints ("joint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "joint_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each positional data entry */,
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the joint being measured */,
  "angle_degrees" REAL /* Current angle of the joint in degrees */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the position measurement */,
  "x_mm" REAL /* X coordinate of the joint position */,
  "y_mm" REAL /* Y coordinate of the joint position */,
  "z_mm" REAL /* Z coordinate of the joint position */,
  "velocity_x_mm_per_sec" REAL /* Velocity in the X direction */,
  "velocity_y_mm_per_sec" REAL /* Velocity in the Y direction */,
  "velocity_z_mm_per_sec" REAL /* Velocity in the Z direction */,
  "acceleration_x_mm_per_sec2" REAL /* Acceleration in the X direction */,
  "acceleration_y_mm_per_sec2" REAL /* Acceleration in the Y direction */,
  "acceleration_z_mm_per_sec2" REAL /* Acceleration in the Z direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_positions_joint_id FOREIGN KEY ("joint_id") REFERENCES joints ("joint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the robot model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the robot model */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture */,
  "last_software_update" TEXT /* Last software update date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_joint_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot model */,
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the joint associated with the robot model */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the joint's calibration */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_joint_mapping_joint_id FOREIGN KEY ("joint_id") REFERENCES joints ("joint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_joint_mapping_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES robot_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "joint_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the joint being analyzed */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Performance metric being measured (e.g., range_of_motion) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytics measurement */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., range, speed, torque) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., degrees, mm/s, Nm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_analytics_joint_id FOREIGN KEY ("joint_id") REFERENCES joints ("joint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, operator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation date and time */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last account update date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
